NAVAREA XIX 33/17


1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 030630 UTC MAY 17.
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
 
71-56.9N - 020-14.9E LEIV EIRIKSSON
71-14.5N - 022-15.1E SCARABEO 8
71-36.7N - 021-03.3E SONGA ENABLER
65-01.6N - 006-54.0E DEEPSEA BERGEN

NOTES:
A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT
WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 30/17
